title: hedyotis pilulifera
intro: Hedyotis pilulifera, also known as Rakyat or Ballota, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and India, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Hedyotis pilulifera is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, Hedyotis pilulifera is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
